description: ES [[OwnPropertyKeys]] enumeration order: integer-index keys ascending first, then string keys in insertion order, across Object.keys/values/entries/getOwnPropertyNames/for-in/JSON.stringify/Object.assign. Canonical-index edge cases (leading zero, negative, >=2^32-1) stay as string keys. Adversarial: defineProperty integer keys and delete+re-add re-sort. Pure string-keyed objects keep insertion order.
